title: Reset your PC
license_note: Screenshots from support.microsoft.com. Confirm redistribution with your legal team before use in a shipped product.

steps.text: Back up important files before you begin.
If your device is encrypted, make sure you have your BitLocker recovery key . For more information see Find your BitLocker recovery key .
Restore preinstalled apps : when enabled, any customizations from the PC manufacturer are applied

Clean data : when enabled, it removes files and cleans the drive. If you're planning to donate, recycle, or sell your PC, use this option. This might take some time, but it makes it harder for other people to recover files you've removed
In the Settings app on your Windows device, select System > Recovery . Open Recovery settings
steps.caption: Screenshot of Settings - System - Recovery.

steps.text: Under Recovery options , select Reset PC.
Choose from the options and/or settings in the reset options table​​​​​​​.
Follow the on‑screen instructions to complete the reset.
